a.xlink:title: Represents a user input command that manipulates the game state (level, player, inventory) and return...
Instructs the player to drop the item in their left hand onto the level.
Instructs the player to drop the item in their right hand onto the level.
Transfers the currently selected inventory item to the player's left hand.
Transfers the currently selected inventory item to the player's right hand.
Moves the player one tile down (south) on the level.
Moves the player one tile left (west) on the level.
Moves the player one tile right (east) on the level.
Moves the player one tile up (north) on the level.
Command that causes the game loop to exit.
Picks up the item resting on the player's current tile and places it into the inventory if possible.
